message:
fix: add numeric comparison and -s flag to test builtin

- Add -eq, -ne, -lt, -le, -gt, -ge numeric comparison operators to
  the test builtin. Scripts using `test 1 -eq 1` previously failed
  silently (exit 1) instead of passing.
- Add -s flag (file exists and is non-empty) — commonly used in
  shell scripts for checking if a file has content.
- Add tests for all numeric operators and -s flag.
